# Svelte Markdown

> A powerful, customizable markdown and HTML renderer for Svelte 5 — built for rendering streaming AI agent output from Claude Code, ChatGPT, and agentic workflows. Built on Marked and HTMLParser2 with 24 markdown renderers, 69+ HTML tag renderers, LRU token caching, allow/deny filtering, and XSS-safe defaults.

## Overview

- Package: `@humanspeak/svelte-markdown`
- License: MIT
- Requires: Svelte 5
- Maintained by: [Humanspeak, Inc.](https://humanspeak.com)
- Current version: see https://www.npmjs.com/package/@humanspeak/svelte-markdown

## Installation

```bash
npm install @humanspeak/svelte-markdown
```

## Basic Usage

```svelte
<script>
    import SvelteMarkdown from '@humanspeak/svelte-markdown'
    const source = '# Hello World\n\nThis is **bold** and *italic* text.'
</script>

<SvelteMarkdown {source} />
```

## Key Features

- AI agent / LLM output rendering — stream mixed markdown and HTML from Claude Code, ChatGPT, Gemini, and agentic workflows
- LLM streaming mode with smart token diffing (sub-2ms updates regardless of document size)
- Streaming-aware sanitization — XSS defaults applied per token as chunks arrive, half-open tags buffer until well-formed
- XSS-safe defaults — URL protocol allowlist (blocks `javascript:`, `data:`, `vbscript:`, `blob:`); strips `on*` event handlers and `srcdoc`
- 24 built-in markdown renderers (heading, paragraph, link, code, table, etc.)
- 69+ HTML tag renderers for raw HTML within markdown
- Svelte 5 runes compatibility ($props, $derived) with full TypeScript types
- LRU token caching (50-200x faster re-renders)
- Allow/deny filtering for HTML tags and markdown renderers (`allowHtmlOnly`, `excludeHtmlOnly`, `buildUnsupportedHTML`)
- Custom renderer components and Svelte 5 snippet overrides for inline customization
- Marked extensions support (KaTeX, Mermaid, alerts, footnotes)
- Async markdown parsing support
- Secure HTML parsing via HTMLParser2 (no `innerHTML`)

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/getting-started)
- [API Reference](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/api/svelte-markdown)
- [Types & Exports](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/api/types)
- [Markdown Renderers](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/renderers/markdown-renderers)
- [HTML Renderers](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/renderers/html-renderers)
- [Custom Renderers](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/renderers/custom-renderers)
- [Snippet Overrides](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/renderers/snippet-overrides)
- [Token Caching](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/advanced/token-caching)
- [Allow/Deny Filtering](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/advanced/allow-deny)
- [Security](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/advanced/security)
- [Marked Extensions](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/advanced/marked-extensions)
- [Migration Guide](https://markdown.svelte.page/docs/migration)
- [Full LLM Reference](https://markdown.svelte.page/llms-full.txt)
